news.headline: Slavery reparations are just, but who exactly owes whom?
news.summary: Some African elites benefited from slave trade and colonisation. This must be taken into account in reparation debates.

news.headline: Strait of Hormuz : Iran to block transit until US lifts its blockade
news.summary: Tensions continue to rise in the Middle East, with Iran briefly reopening the Strait of Hormuz before closing it again after around 20 hours. Tehran says the US is not respecting the terms of the agreement reached, casting further doubt on the fragile deal. Meanwhile, negotiations are still ongoing
